sentences.target: Tu as pris un cachet ce matin.
sentences.reading: /ty a pʁi œ̃ ka.ʃɛ sə ma.tɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu as pris un cachet ce matin.
translations.ipa: /ty a pʁi œ̃ ka.ʃɛ sə ma.tɛ̃/
translations.en: Did you take a pill this morning?
translations.de: Hast du heute Morgen eine Tablette genommen?
translations.pt: Você tomou um comprimido esta manhã?
translations.tr: Bu sabah bir hap aldın mı?
translations.vi: Sáng nay bạn đã uống thuốc chưa?
translations.nl: Heb je vanmorgen een pil genomen?
translations.hi: क्या तुमने आज सुबह गोली ली?
translations.nb: Tok du en tablett i morges?
translations.sv: Tog du en tablett i morse?
translations.ro: Ai luat o pastilă în această dimineață?
translations.da: Tog du en pille i morges?
translations.ja: 今朝、薬を飲みましたか？

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Auxiliary verb (present 2nd sg) forming the passé composé with the past participle 'pris'.
Past participle; main lexical verb of the compound tense ('as pris').
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing a non-specific noun.
Common noun; here means a tablet/medicine.
Demonstrative determiner modifying the temporal noun 'matin'.
Common noun; part of a temporal adverbial phrase 'ce matin'.

sentences.target: On cherche le cachet pour le courrier.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ lə ka.ʃɛ puʁ lə kuʁ.je/

translations.fr: On cherche le cachet pour le courrier.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ lə ka.ʃɛ puʁ lə kuʁ.je/
translations.en: We’re looking for the stamp for the mail.
translations.es: Estamos buscando el sello para el correo.
translations.de: Wir suchen den Stempel für die Post.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando il timbro per la posta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找邮寄用的印章。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度搵寄件用嘅印仔。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando o carimbo para o correio.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm con dấu cho thư từ.
translations.nl: We zoeken de stempel voor de post.
translations.hi: हम डाक के लिए मुहर ढूँढ रहे हैं।
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε τη σφραγίδα για το ταχυδρομείο.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter stempelet til posten.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari stempel untuk surat.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter stämpeln för posten.
translations.da: Vi leder efter stemplet til posten.
translations.ja: 郵便用のはんこを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal pronoun; often used colloquially for 'we'.
Main verb in the present tense, 3rd person singular, agreeing with 'On'.
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun; here denotes a stamp or seal used for mail.
Preposition introducing a purpose/complement ('pour le courrier').
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun; refers to mail/post.

sentences.target: Cet appart a vraiment du cachet.

translations.fr: Cet appart a vraiment du cachet.
translations.zh-Hans: 这套公寓真的很有格调。
translations.yue: 呢個單位真係好有特色。
translations.ru: У этой квартиры действительно есть шарм.
translations.tr: Bu dairenin gerçekten bir havası var.
translations.vi: Căn hộ này thực sự rất có nét.
translations.ar: هذه الشقة فيها فعلاً طابع מميز.
translations.uk: Ця квартира справді має свій шарм.
translations.hu: Ennek a lakásnak tényleg van hangulata.
translations.hi: इस अपार्टमेंट में सच में एक खास आकर्षण है.
translations.el: Αυτό το διαμέρισμα έχει πραγματικά χαρακτήρα.
translations.sv: Den här lägenheten har verkligen karaktär.
translations.ro: Apartamentul acesta are cu adevărat farmec.
translations.ja: このアパートは本当に味があります。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (masc. sg. before vowel/h), modifying 'appart'.
Common noun, colloquial abbreviation of 'appartement'; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb 'avoir' (present 3rd sg), expressing possession/attribute.
Adverb intensifier modifying the predicate ('a du cachet').
Partitive article (de + le), marking an unspecified amount/quality.
Common noun; here means distinctive charm/character (idiom 'avoir du cachet').

sentences.target: Ils fixent leur cachet pour le concert.
sentences.reading: /il fiks lœʁ ka.ʃɛ puʁ lə kɔ̃.sɛʁ/

translations.fr: Ils fixent leur cachet pour le concert.
translations.ipa: /il fiks lœʁ ka.ʃɛ puʁ lə kɔ̃.sɛʁ/
translations.en: They’re setting their fee for the concert.
translations.es: Están fijando su caché para el concierto.
translations.de: Sie legen ihre Gage für das Konzert fest.
translations.it: Stanno fissando il loro cachet per il concerto.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在敲定演出的酬劳。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺度敲定演出嘅出場費。
translations.ru: Они устанавливают свой гонорар за концерт.
translations.pt: Eles estão definindo o cachê para o concerto.
translations.vi: Họ đang chốt thù lao cho buổi hòa nhạc.
translations.nl: Ze stellen hun gage voor het concert vast.
translations.uk: Вони визначають свій гонорар за концерт.
translations.hu: A koncertre a fellépti díjukat állapítják meg.
translations.hi: वे कॉन्सर्ट के लिए अपनी फीस तय कर रहे हैं।
translations.el: Καθορίζουν την αμοιβή τους για τη συναυλία.
translations.nb: De fastsetter honoraret sitt for konserten.
translations.id: Mereka sedang menetapkan bayaran mereka untuk konser itu.
translations.sv: De fastställer sitt arvode för konserten.
translations.da: De fastsætter deres honorar for koncerten.
translations.ja: 彼らはコンサートの出演料を決めतेいる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural (masc. or mixed).
Main verb, present tense 3rd person plural ('ils fixent').
Possessive determiner modifying 'cachet'.
Common noun; here means an artist’s performance fee.
Preposition indicating purpose/occasion ('pour le concert').
Definite article, masculine singular.
Common noun; complement of the preposition 'pour'.
